final_plan:
#Task1: Retrieve historical data for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 at the main site for the period from 2020-05-01T12:30:00 to 2022-06-30T19:30:00.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical data for Chiller 9 (CWC04009) at the main site from 2020-05-01T12:30:00 to 2022-06-30T19:30:00.

#Task2: Analyze the retrieved historical data for anomalies or operation violations related to condenser water side fouling.
#Agent2: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Analysis report highlighting any anomalies or operation violations in the chiller's performance.

#Task3: Identify relevant sensors for monitoring condenser water side fouling failure mode for Chiller 9.
#Agent3: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency3: None
#ExpectedOutput3: List of relevant sensors for monitoring condenser water side fouling.

#Task4: Generate a work order based on the analysis and identified anomalies or operation violations.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S2 #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: Guideline on work order generation for preventive or corrective actions.
